title: SSD Upgrade & System Tune
issue: Slow boot (over 3 minutes) and general sluggishness
excerpt: Upgraded from HDD to NVMe SSD, added more RAM, and cleaned up the OS for a brand new feel.
problem: Client's custom desktop was running an old HDD as the boot drive. Boot times were over 3 minutes and the system felt very sluggish even for basic tasks like web browsing and file management.
process:
1. Backed up all important data from existing HDD.
2. Installed a Samsung 1TB NVMe SSD.
3. Performed a clean install of Windows 11 on the new SSD.
4. Installed all drivers and critical updates.
5. Added 16GB DDR4 RAM (system now has 32GB total).
6. Repurposed the old HDD as a secondary storage drive.
7. Ran benchmarks to verify performance improvements.
8. Boot time reduced from 3+ minutes to under 15 seconds.
partsUsed:
Samsung 1TB NVMe SSD (990 EVO)
16GB DDR4-3200 RAM
reviewText: Wow, what a difference! My PC feels brand new. Sosa was professional, fast, and explained everything clearly. Boots in seconds now. Will definitely come back for any future repairs.
